pullRequestReview.purpose: Review pull requests, fail closed on missing checks, and merge only approved work.

githubActionsDeploy.purpose: Deploy the default branch and verify health checks.

autoExecuteIssue.enableCondition: Issue must be explicitly labeled auto-execute.
autoExecuteIssue.reason: This lane grants unattended write and PR permissions, so it must not run on every opened issue.

dailyAgentRunner.reason: Scheduled broad-trust agent runners require project-specific review before installation.

rules: Never push directly to the default branch.
Automation that can merge or deploy must fail closed on missing, pending, failed, or unparseable checks.
Automation prompts and scripts are runtime automation, not docs-only changes.
Unattended agents must have an explicit queue label, lock guard, timeout, and recovery path.
Production deploy success must be based on health/E2E signals, not notification comments.
